stakingduration1: Stakes of 10 {{tokenSymbol}} or more qualifies for at least 10% APR, which increases progressively based on the staking amount. A maximum of 10%/15%/24%/36% respectively be reached when the stake is 10,000 {{tokenSymbol}} or more.
additionalstaking1: Different duration plans cannot be combined.
additionalstaking2: Same duration plans can have additional amounts staked.
additionalstaking3: After adding, the lock-in period for the entire amount will be recalculated.
earlyunstaking1: *Promotional APR stakes always apply full penalty.
earlyunstaking2: You can now unstake part of your funds early. The penalty applies only to the withdrawn portion (time-based), and rewards on that portion stop and are paid out. The remaining amount becomes a new stake with updated APR and terms.
earlyunstaking3: If the unstaking is done after the stake duration, there is no penalty. Partial or full unstake allowed anytime; remaining funds still restart as a new stake
automatic1: When the original staking duration ends, the stake will automatically renew for the same duration.
automatic2: During the renewed period and beyond, rewards will be recalculated and become claimable.
automatic3: Additionally, users can unstake at any time without incurring penalty.
automatic4: However, promotional APR will not apply to the renewed period.
unstake1: To avoid holding losses, the amounts after unstaking will take 7 to 10 days to be returned. During this period, the amounts remain traded on the exchange, and temporarily unstaking may lead to losses.

whitePaper.title: Legal Disclaimer for Staking Services on Whale Strategy
whitePaper.intro: By accessing or using the staking services on Whale Strategy, you acknowledge and agree to the terms outlined in this legal disclaimer. Staking in cryptocurrency or tokenized assets involves inherent risk, and you are advised to carefully read and understand these terms before proceeding.
whitePaper.sections.general.title: General Information
whitePaper.sections.general.body: Whale Strategy offers staking services for various tokenized assets. While we provide information on staking opportunities, all financial decisions, including which assets to stake, are solely your responsibility. Whale Strategy does not guarantee financial gains, and any outcomes, positive or negative, from staking are the result of your individual choices and market conditions.
whitePaper.sections.noAdvice.title: No Investment Advice
whitePaper.sections.noAdvice.body: Whale Strategy does not provide any form of financial or investment advice. All content provided on our platform is intended for informational purposes only. The decision to stake or invest in any tokenized asset is entirely your own, and we recommend consulting with qualified financial, legal, and tax professionals before making any decisions.
whitePaper.sections.risk.title: Risk Disclosure
whitePaper.sections.risk.body: Staking in digital assets carries significant risks, including the potential for complete loss of staked assets. Factors such as market volatility, technological issues, or changes in network protocols can negatively impact staking outcomes. You accept these risks and agree that Whale Strategy will not be held liable for any financial losses or reduced rewards resulting from staking activities.
whitePaper.sections.rewards.title: Rewards and Yields
whitePaper.sections.rewards.body: Staking rewards, including any potential yields, are determined by the underlying blockchain protocols and are not guaranteed by Whale Strategy. Any illustrative figures displayed on our platform are for informational purposes only and do not guarantee future returns.
whitePaper.sections.userResponsibility.b: You are solely responsible for securing your assets, managing your staking activities, and maintaining the safety of your accounts and wallets. This includes safeguarding your private keys and regularly monitoring your staking positions. Whale Strategy assumes no responsibility for unauthorized access to or loss of your digital assets due to your failure to properly secure your accounts.
whitePaper.sections.compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
whitePaper.sections.compliance.body: Your use of Whale Strategy’s staking services must comply with the laws and regulations applicable in your jurisdiction. Cryptocurrencies and tokenized assets may not be considered legal tender but may be classified as virtual commodities or assets. You are responsible for understanding the legal and tax obligations associated with staking in your location. Whale Strategy may restrict access to its services in regions where such activities are regulated or prohibited.
whitePaper.sections.changes.title: Changes to Terms
whitePaper.sections.changes.body: Whale Strategy reserves the right to modify these terms at any time without prior notice. Changes will be effective upon posting on our platform, and your continued use of the staking services will constitute your acceptance of the updated terms.
whitePaper.sections.liability.title: Limitation of Liability
whitePaper.sections.liability.body: Whale Strategy will not be held liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, including loss of staked assets, profits, or data, resulting from your use of the staking services. Your participation in staking is at your own risk, and you assume full responsibility for any potential losses.

version10.title: Version 1.0
version10.aprExplanation: The APR will remain at 15%, 24%, and 36% respectively, even if the staking amount exceeds 10,000 {{tokenSymbol}}, depending on the duration selected.

version11.title: Version 1.1
version11.aprAdjustment: The APR will adjust within these ranges based on the staking amount, which increases up to a maximum of 15%/24%/36% when reaching 10,000U.
version11.oldFormulaRemoved: The old '10,000U division' formula has been removed to prevent small stakes from earning less than the minimum APR.
version11.stakeQualification: Any stake of 10U or more will qualify for at least 12% APR, which increases up to a maximum of 15%/24%/36% when reaching 10,000U.
version11.mergingStakes: Merging or adding to an existing stake
version11.existingStake: If a user already has an active stake, they can directly add more amount to the existing plan. When an additional amount is added, the lock-in period and APR will be recalculated based on the new total amount. Any rewards earned, whether claimed or unclaimed, will remain unaffected.
version11.promotionEnd: Users cannot add more tokens to a promotional stake once the promotion period has ended.
version11.benStakeExample: Ben has already staked 100 {{tokenSymbol}} for 180 days. After 40 days, he decides to add another 2900 {{tokenSymbol}}. Once the 2900 {{tokenSymbol}} is added, the remaining 140-day countdown for the original 100 {{tokenSymbol}} will be forfeited. Instead, the total staked amount of 3000 {{tokenSymbol}} will start a new 180-day countdown with a newly calculated APR. The earnings accumulated from the initial 40 days will remain unaffected, regardless of whether they have been withdrawn or not.
version11.maximumStake: Maximum stake: Any stake exceeding 10,000U will automatically receive the highest APR for that duration
version11.displayCompanyName: Displaying the company name in wallet approval
version11.exploringDisplay: We are exploring the possibility of displaying our company or project name in the token approval request so that users know exactly who they are granting access to.
version11.renewalDetails: When the original staking duration ends, the stake will automatically renew for the same duration. During the renewed period and beyond, rewards will be recalculated and become claimable.
version11.unstakeAnytime: Additionally, users can unstake at any time without incurring the 10% penalty. However, the full APR promotion and time-limited promotions will not apply to the renewed contract.
version11.promotionNotApply: However, the full APR promotion and time-limited promotions will not apply to the renewed contract.
version11.holdingLosses: To avoid holding losses, the amounts after unstaking will take 7 to 10 days to be returned. During this period, the amounts remain traded on the exchange, and temporarily unstaking may lead to losses.

version12.title: Version 1.2
version12.originalTerms: Users who have already staked in v1.0/v1.1 will maintain their original terms until the staking period ends. These existing stakes in previous versions cannot be renewed or increased in amount.
version12.integration: Integration with BSC (Binance Smart Chain) is now available.

v13.title: Version 1.3
v13.rewardsMatter: Your rewards matter, that's why no penalty is ever applied after your staking period ends.
v13.stability: To ensure stability and safeguard returns, early unstaking will now include a fair penalty based on how early you exit.
v13.longerStay: The longer you stay staked, the lower the penalty with a minimum of just 10%.
v13.promoNote: *Promotional APR stakes always apply full penalty.
v13.partialUnstakeDesc: You can now unstake part of your funds early.
v13.penaltyApplies: - Penalty applies only to the withdrawn portion (time-based)
v13.rewardsStop: - Rewards on that portion stop and are paid out
v13.remainingAmount: - Remaining amount becomes a new stake with updated APR and terms
v13.afterDurationDesc: No penalty. Partial or full unstake allowed anytime; remaining funds still restart as a new stake.
v13.promoAddFunds: - Add funds: Only while promo is active (creates new stake)
v13.promoAfterDuration: - After stake duration: Only full unstake allowed. No add funds. No auto-renew.
v13.problem1: 1. Size difference between whale head and body

v14.title: Version 1.4
v14.availableNetworks: WStaking is now available on three networks:
v14.chainDescription: Each chain runs its own verified WStaking contract, and users can choose the network that best fits their trading and fee preferences.
v14.aprDescription: The APR ranges, time-based penalties, partial unstake rules, and promotional stake rules introduced in Version 1.3 continue to apply in Version 1.4 on all supported chains:
v14.aprRangesUnchanged: APR ranges by duration (1 / 3 / 6 / 12 months) remain unchanged.
v14.timeBased Penalty: Time-based early unstake penalty still applies, decreasing over time with a minimum of 10%.
v14.partialUnstakeAllowed: Partial unstake is allowed (except for promotional APR stakes), with penalty applied only to the withdrawn portion and the remaining part restarting as a new stake.
v14.noPenaltyAfterDuration: No penalty after the staking duration ends; users may unstake partially or fully, and remaining funds continue as a new stake.
v14.promoRules: Promotional APR stakes still follow the special rules:
v14.addFundsPromoOnly: Add funds only while the promotion is active (creates a new stake)
v14.afterDurationFullUnstake: After the duration ends, only full unstake is allowed; no add-fund or auto-renew
v14.existingStakesKeepTerms: Stakes created under v1.0, v1.1, v1.2, and v1.3 keep their original terms, APR, and penalty rules until completion.
v14.newStakesFollowV14: New stakes created after the v1.4 upgrade will follow the v1.4 (v1.3 logic + multi-chain multi-token) rules.
v14.chainDisplay: Each chain clearly displays its own contract address and supported tokens to avoid confusion.
v14.unifiedLogic: The staking logic is unified across all networks so users have a consistent experience whether they use X Layer, BSC, or Base.
v14.auditedContracts: All contracts continue to be audited, upgradeable, and monitored, with the goal of providing stable, transparent, and long-term staking returns.

v15.title: Version 1.5
v15.intro: WStaking has been upgraded to Version 1.5 to improve platform safety, consistency, and long-term stability across supported chains.
v15.new1: Stronger protection for user stake records to prevent conflicts and improve stake tracking reliability.
v15.new2: Improved claim and unstake flow checks to reduce failed payout scenarios and improve processing safety.
v15.new3: Better handling of staking updates to improve reward calculation consistency after balance changes.
v15.new4: Enhanced token transfer safeguards for more predictable staking behavior.
v15.new5: Governance permissions simplified to reduce operational risk and improve control clarity.
v15.new6: Promotion handling optimized to keep contract operations efficient as user activity grows.
v15.apr1: APR ranges and core staking behavior remain aligned with previous versions.
v15.apr2: Existing time-based penalty logic and promotion structure continue to apply.
v15.apr3: User-facing staking experience remains familiar, with backend reliability improvements in v1.5.
v15.existing1: Existing stakes continue under their configured terms.
v15.existing2: New stakes created after the v1.5 deployment use the upgraded contract logic.
v15.user1: No major UI flow changes are required for normal staking actions.
v15.user2: This release focuses on safer execution, stronger consistency, and better operational resilience.

upgradePopup.title: Security & Reliability Upgrade

upgradePopup.point1: Stronger protection for user stake records
upgradePopup.point2: Safer claim and unstake flow validation
upgradePopup.point3: Improved reward consistency after balance changes
upgradePopup.point4: Simplified governance permissions for safer operations

trustAudit.subtitle: WStaking is designed to prioritize user confidence through independent review, transparent communication, and a security-first approach.
trustAudit.point2: All critical & high severity issues resolved
